topic: 如何优化当前的learn:profile的实现

key_files.role: Tech keyword mapping for role-based inference

findings: Conceptual questions hardcoded for only 4 topics (typescript, javascript, react, node)
Practical challenge fixtures only for 4 topics
No background/context fields (work experience, projects, education)
No custom field support - schema is fixed
Proficiency scores lack clear definition framework
Legacy string-based evidence difficult to parse
Profile storage via ccw CLI commands (decoupled)
Evidence types can be extended with proper structure
KeywordDictionary.json can be extended for role inference

improvement_suggestions.suggestion: Add background field with work_experience and personal_projects arrays
improvement_suggestions.benefit: Enable automatic known_topics population from background

improvement_suggestions.suggestion: Formalize feedback_journal as interactive loop mechanism
improvement_suggestions.benefit: Enable proactive clarification and profile improvement
Safe extension point without schema conflicts

open_questions: Should background → ability mapping be automatic or user-confirmed?
How to handle proficiency score migration for existing profiles?
What's the desired interaction pattern for profile refinement?
Should custom fields be completely freeform or have guidelines?
